Operation"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Request:", "bold": true}, {"text": " POST"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Unlike\u00a0"}, {"text": "upsert", "italic": true}, {"text": ",\u00a0"}, {"text": "update", "italic": true}, {"text": "\u00a0operation allows only to update item groups that are already present in Merchandising Cloud - you cannot create add new item groups with update operation. However, the benefit of\u00a0"}, {"text": "update", "italic": true}, {"text": "\u00a0is that all the fields of the payload, except for\u00a0"}, {"text": "item_group_id", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0(and variant\u00a0"}, {"text": "id", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0if\u00a0"}, {"text": "variants", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0array is present in the payload) are optional, so you can use this route to send partial item group/variant updates to our system. This can be useful when you just need to update the\u00a0"}, {"text": "price", "italic": true}, {"text": ",\u00a0"}, {"text": "availability", "italic": true}, {"text": ", or\u00a0"}, {"text": "quantity", "italic": true}, {"text": "\u00a0of the item group and don't want to pass the whole object to Merchandising Cloud."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "\ud83d\udea7 Combine multiple item group updates into one request\n"}]}, {"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you need to update several fields of one item group,
